svg:
Moon Traveler Terminal
<<<<<<< Updated upstream
Moon Traveler Terminal load — Load a saved game sound — Toggle sound effects screenshot — Save a screenshot (F12) tutorial — Replay the tutorial config — Game settings (save path, GPU, context) clear / cls — Clear the screen help — Show this help message quit / exit — Exit game
Ship Bays (Crash Site): ship repair — Install repair materials to fix the ship ship storage — Stash/retrieve items from ship storage ship kitchen — Cook bio_gel (+40% food) or ice_crystal (+40% water ship charging — Recharge drone battery, overcharge, auto-charge toggle ship medical — Repair suit (costs battery) or rest to recover
▏ Food█████100%Water█████100%Suit█████100%Batt██████115%Ship Crash Site > Enter command...
=======
Moon Traveler Terminal trade — Trade items with a Merchant creature escort — Ask a creature to travel with you (trust 50+)
Drone: drone — Show drone status and upgrades drone upgrade <part> — Install a drone upgrade from inventory drone charge — Toggle auto-charge (requires Charge Module)
Player: status — Show player vitals (food, water, suit, time) rest — Rest 1 hour (+10% food/water, +20% at ship)
Ship: ship — Show repair progress (bays available at Crash Site)
System: save — Save game (default: 'manual') load — Load a saved game sound — Toggle sound effects screenshot — Save a screenshot (F12) tutorial — Replay the tutorial config — Game settings (save path, GPU, context) clear / cls — Clear the screen help — Show this help message quit / exit — Exit game
▂▂ Ship Bays (Crash Site): ship repair — Install repair materials to fix the ship ship storage — Stash/retrieve items from ship storage ship kitchen — Cook bio_gel (+40% food) or ice_crystal (+40% water) ship charging — Recharge drone battery, overcharge, auto-charge toggle ship medical — Repair suit (costs battery) or rest to recover
Food█████100%Water█████100%Suit█████100%Batt██████115%Ship 0/3Inv 3/15⏱ 0h Crash Site > Enter command...
>>>>>>> Stashed changes
